args.text: Incident ownership confirmed. Beginning remediation for duplicate billing charges affecting orders ORD-5501, ORD-5502, ORD-5503.
Double-charge guard fix deployed. billing-api v3.4.1 is now live. Guard is enabled in billing-config.json and active in production.

args.subject: Your Brightloom refund has been issued
Your Brightloom refund has been issued
Your Brightloom refund has been issued
Billing incident TCK-2201: refunds summary
args.body:
Refunds have been issued for billing incident TCK-2201 affecting three customer orders:

- ORD-5501: $19.99 refunded to amara.osei@fernpost.example
- ORD-5502: $19.99 refunded to jonas.beck@quillmail.example  
- ORD-5503: $39.98 refunded to priya.nair@lumenpost.example

Total refunded: $79.96

All customers have been notified. The underlying issue (disabled double-charge guard) has been remediated with deployment of billing-api v3.4.1.
